tasks.title: Setup Project Repository
tasks.description: Initialize the project repository with the necessary structure and configuration files.
tasks.details: Create a Git repository and set up the initial directory structure as outlined in the PRD. Include a README.md and a .gitignore file. Initialize a Python virtual environment and install initial dependencies such as FastAPI and Pydantic.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify the repository structure matches the PRD. Ensure all initial dependencies are installed without errors.
tasks.expansionPrompt: No expansion needed for this task.

tasks.title: Implement Strategy Registry
tasks.description: Develop a central registry for type-safe strategy lookup and metadata.
tasks.details: Create a decorator-based registration system for strategies. Implement validation to ensure strategies conform to expected interfaces. Provide a method to list all registered strategies with their metadata.
tasks.testStrategy: Write unit tests to register, list, and validate strategies. Ensure duplicate registrations are handled gracefully.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on implement strategy registry.

tasks.title: Develop Cost Tracking Module
tasks.description: Create a module to calculate and aggregate API costs using versioned pricing.
tasks.details: Load pricing data from a JSON configuration file. Implement functions to calculate costs based on input and output tokens, supporting historical pricing. Provide a fallback to default pricing if necessary.
tasks.testStrategy: Test cost calculations with various token counts and pricing configurations. Validate historical pricing support.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on develop cost tracking module.

tasks.title: Build Single Strategy Execution
tasks.description: Implement the execution of a single RAG strategy with configuration and metrics tracking.
tasks.details: Develop a function to execute a strategy based on its name and configuration. Track execution metrics such as cost, latency, and token counts. Integrate with the strategy registry and cost tracking modules.
tasks.testStrategy: Mock strategy executions and verify that metrics are accurately tracked and returned.

subtasks.title: Design Execution Logic
subtasks.description: Create a detailed design for executing a RAG strategy.
subtasks.details: Outline the steps and components needed to execute a strategy based on its configuration. Define interfaces and data flow.
subtasks.testStrategy: Review design with stakeholders and validate against requirements.

subtasks.title: Implement Metrics Tracking
subtasks.description: Develop functionality to track execution metrics.
subtasks.details: Implement tracking for cost, latency, and token counts. Ensure metrics are collected and stored efficiently.
subtasks.testStrategy: Simulate executions and verify metrics are recorded accurately.

subtasks.title: Integrate with Strategy Registry
subtasks.description: Connect the execution logic with the strategy registry.
subtasks.details: Ensure the execution function can retrieve strategies from the registry. Handle errors and validate strategy data.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test integration with mock registry data to ensure correct strategy retrieval.

subtasks.title: Test Execution and Metrics
subtasks.description: Test the execution logic and metrics tracking.
subtasks.details: Develop tests to ensure the execution function works as expected and metrics are tracked correctly. Use mock data for testing.
subtasks.testStrategy: Use unit and integration tests to validate execution and metrics accuracy.

tasks.expansionPrompt: No expansion needed for this task.

tasks.title: Create Chain State Management
tasks.description: Manage immutable ChainContext that passes between strategy steps.
tasks.details: Implement a frozen dataclass for ChainContext. Include methods for functional updates using with_* methods to maintain immutability.
tasks.testStrategy: Test the immutability of ChainContext and the correctness of functional updates.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on create chain state management.

tasks.title: Implement Sequential Strategy Executor
tasks.description: Develop functionality to execute strategies sequentially in a chain.
tasks.details: Create a function to iterate through a list of strategies, executing each in sequence and updating the ChainContext. Ensure each step's results are appended to the context.
tasks.testStrategy: Test sequential execution with mock strategies, verifying context updates at each step.

subtasks.title: Design Strategy Execution Flow
subtasks.description: Outline the flow for executing strategies in sequence.
subtasks.details: Create a flowchart or diagram to visualize the sequential execution of strategies, ensuring each step updates the ChainContext appropriately.

subtasks.title: Implement Strategy Execution Logic
subtasks.description: Develop the core logic to execute strategies sequentially.
subtasks.details: Write a function that iterates through a list of strategies, executing each one in order and updating the ChainContext with the results of each step.
subtasks.testStrategy: Use mock strategies to verify that each step updates the context correctly.

subtasks.title: Test Sequential Execution
subtasks.description: Verify the sequential execution of strategies and context updates.
subtasks.details: Develop tests to ensure that strategies are executed in the correct order and that the ChainContext is updated accurately after each execution.
subtasks.testStrategy: Implement unit tests with mock strategies to validate the execution order and context updates.

tasks.expansionPrompt: No expansion needed for this task.

tasks.title: Add Chain Fallback Handler
tasks.description: Handle failures during chain execution with graceful fallback mechanisms.
tasks.details: Implement error handling to log failures and attempt fallback strategies if configured. Use exception chaining to provide detailed error context.
tasks.testStrategy: Simulate failures and test fallback execution paths. Verify error logging and exception chaining.

subtasks.title: Design Fallback Mechanism
subtasks.description: Create a detailed design for the fallback mechanism to handle chain execution failures.
subtasks.details: Outline the fallback strategies and error handling flow. Consider different failure scenarios and how the system should respond.
subtasks.testStrategy: Review design with stakeholders and validate against requirements.

subtasks.title: Implement Error Handling and Fallback Logic
subtasks.description: Develop the error handling and fallback logic for chain execution.
subtasks.details: Implement logging of failures and configure fallback strategies. Use exception chaining to provide detailed error context.
subtasks.testStrategy: Simulate various failure scenarios and verify that fallback logic executes correctly.

subtasks.title: Test Fallback Scenarios
subtasks.description: Test the implemented fallback mechanisms to ensure reliability and correctness.
subtasks.details: Create test cases to simulate failures and verify that the fallback mechanisms work as intended. Ensure error logging and exception chaining are functioning.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run automated tests and perform manual testing to cover edge cases.

tasks.expansionPrompt: No expansion needed for this task.

tasks.title: Develop Parallel Execution Engine
tasks.description: Run multiple strategies concurrently using asyncio.gather.
tasks.details: Implement a function to execute strategies concurrently. Use asyncio.gather to manage parallel execution and handle exceptions.
tasks.testStrategy: Test concurrent execution with mock strategies, ensuring results and errors are correctly handled.

subtasks.title: Implement Strategy Execution Function
subtasks.description: Develop a function to execute multiple strategies concurrently using asyncio.gather.
subtasks.details: Create a function that accepts a list of strategy functions and uses asyncio.gather to run them concurrently. Ensure that the function can handle exceptions gracefully and return results or errors appropriately.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test with mock strategies to ensure concurrent execution and error handling.

subtasks.title: Integrate Exception Handling in Parallel Execution
subtasks.description: Enhance the parallel execution engine to manage exceptions effectively during strategy execution.
subtasks.details: Modify the execution function to include robust exception handling. Use try-except blocks to capture and log exceptions without stopping the execution of other strategies. Ensure that exceptions are returned in a structured format.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test with strategies designed to fail, ensuring exceptions are logged and handled without affecting other executions.

tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on develop parallel execution engine.

tasks.title: Implement Resource Semaphore Manager
tasks.description: Limit concurrent access to shared resources using semaphores.
tasks.details: Use asyncio.Semaphore to manage resource limits for database and API connections. Implement cleanup using AsyncExitStack.
tasks.testStrategy: Test resource limiting with mock strategies, ensuring semaphores are respected.
tasks.expansionPrompt: No expansion needed for this task.

tasks.title: Create Comparison Result Aggregator
tasks.description: Aggregate results from parallel execution for comparison.
tasks.details: Develop functionality to aggregate execution results, calculate relative metrics, and rank strategies by latency, cost, and accuracy.
tasks.testStrategy: Test aggregation logic with varied results, verifying correct metric calculations and rankings.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on create comparison result aggregator.

tasks.title: Add Timeout and Partial Failure Handler
tasks.description: Handle timeouts and partial failures in parallel execution.
tasks.details: Implement logic to separate successful results from failures, log timeouts, and continue processing with available results.
tasks.testStrategy: Simulate timeouts and failures, verifying correct handling and logging.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on add timeout and partial failure handler.

tasks.title: Implement IR Metrics Calculation
tasks.description: Calculate IR metrics such as Precision@k, Recall@k, MRR, and NDCG@k.
tasks.details: Use the ir-measures library to calculate metrics. Implement comprehensive validation and edge case handling.
tasks.testStrategy: Test metric calculations with various input scenarios, including edge cases.

subtasks.title: Implement Precision@k and Recall@k Calculation
subtasks.description: Develop functions to calculate Precision@k and Recall@k using the ir-measures library.
subtasks.details: Use the ir-measures library to implement functions for calculating Precision@k and Recall@k. Ensure the functions handle various input sizes and edge cases.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test with different k values and edge cases.

subtasks.title: Implement MRR and NDCG@k Calculation
subtasks.description: Create functions to calculate MRR and NDCG@k using the ir-measures library.
subtasks.details: Utilize the ir-measures library to implement functions for MRR and NDCG@k. Include validation for input data and handle edge cases effectively.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test with diverse datasets and edge cases to ensure accuracy.

tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on implement ir metrics calculation.

tasks.title: Develop Benchmark Runner
tasks.description: Run multiple queries across strategies for statistical analysis.
tasks.details: Implement a runner to execute benchmarks with multiple iterations for stability. Provide statistical summaries and strategy rankings.
tasks.testStrategy: Test benchmark execution with mock data, verifying statistical accuracy.

subtasks.title: Design Benchmark Framework
subtasks.description: Create a framework to support benchmark execution and analysis.
subtasks.details: Outline the architecture for the benchmark runner, including modules for execution, data collection, and analysis. Define interfaces for strategy integration.
subtasks.testStrategy: Review design with stakeholders and validate against requirements.

subtasks.title: Implement Execution Logic
subtasks.description: Develop the logic to execute benchmarks with multiple iterations.
subtasks.details: Implement the core execution engine using asyncio for parallel execution. Ensure it can handle multiple strategies and iterations for stability.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test execution with mock strategies to ensure correct iteration and concurrency handling.

subtasks.title: Develop Statistical Analysis
subtasks.description: Create modules to analyze benchmark results and provide statistical summaries.
subtasks.details: Implement functions to calculate statistical metrics such as mean, median, and standard deviation. Rank strategies based on performance metrics.
subtasks.testStrategy: Use sample data to verify statistical calculations and rankings.

tasks.expansionPrompt: No expansion needed for this task.

tasks.title: Create Ground Truth Management
tasks.description: Load, validate, and manage test datasets with ground truth.
tasks.details: Implement functionality to load datasets, validate schema, and support train/test splits. Use LLM-assisted generation for ground truth.
tasks.testStrategy: Test dataset loading and validation with sample data. Verify train/test split functionality.

subtasks.title: Load and Validate Datasets
subtasks.description: Implement functionality to load datasets and validate their schema.
subtasks.details: Develop a module to load datasets from various sources and validate their schema against predefined standards.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test with sample datasets to ensure correct loading and schema validation.

subtasks.title: Implement Train/Test Split Support
subtasks.description: Add support for splitting datasets into training and testing sets.
subtasks.details: Create functions to split datasets into train and test sets based on configurable ratios.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify the split functionality with different dataset sizes and configurations.

subtasks.title: Integrate LLM-Assisted Ground Truth Generation
subtasks.description: Use LLMs to assist in generating ground truth data for datasets.
subtasks.details: Integrate LLMs to enhance ground truth data generation, ensuring compatibility with existing data structures.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test LLM integration by generating ground truth for sample datasets and validating output accuracy.

tasks.expansionPrompt: No expansion needed for this task.

tasks.title: Generate Markdown Report
tasks.description: Create markdown-formatted evaluation reports.
tasks.details: Develop a report generator to produce markdown reports with metrics tables, strategy rankings, and cost breakdowns.
tasks.testStrategy: Test report generation with sample data, verifying formatting and content accuracy.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on generate markdown report.

tasks.title: Create HTML Report Generator
tasks.description: Generate styled HTML evaluation reports with interactive elements.
tasks.details: Implement HTML report generation with CSS styling and placeholders for visual charts. Ensure reports are interactive and visually appealing.
tasks.testStrategy: Test HTML generation and styling, ensuring reports are correctly formatted and interactive.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on create html report generator.

tasks.title: Develop JSON Report Exporter
tasks.description: Export evaluation data as structured JSON.
tasks.details: Implement functionality to serialize evaluation data into JSON format, including all metrics and configuration details.
tasks.testStrategy: Test JSON serialization and deserialization, ensuring data integrity.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on develop json report exporter.

tasks.title: Setup API Key Hash Verification
tasks.description: Verify API keys using SHA256 hash against a database.
tasks.details: Implement API key verification by hashing the key and checking against stored hashes. Ensure keys are active and not expired.
tasks.testStrategy: Test key verification with valid, invalid, and expired keys.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on setup api key hash verification.

tasks.title: Implement Atomic Key Usage Update
tasks.description: Update API key usage timestamp atomically during verification.
tasks.details: Use a single UPDATE...RETURNING query to update the last_used_at timestamp, preventing race conditions.
tasks.testStrategy: Test concurrent key verification, ensuring timestamps are updated correctly.
tasks.expansionPrompt: No expansion needed for this task.

tasks.title: Develop Redis Sliding Window Counter
tasks.description: Implement sliding window rate limiting with Redis sorted sets.
tasks.details: Use Redis ZADD, ZREMRANGEBYSCORE, and ZCARD operations to implement rate limiting. Clean up old entries and calculate current request counts.
tasks.testStrategy: Test rate limiting behavior with mock Redis, verifying correct request counting and cleanup.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on develop redis sliding window counter.

tasks.title: Create Rate Limit Result Calculator
tasks.description: Calculate rate limit status from Redis counter data.
tasks.details: Implement logic to determine if requests are allowed based on current count, max limit, and window reset time.
tasks.testStrategy: Test rate limit calculations with various scenarios, ensuring correct results.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on create rate limit result calculator.

tasks.title: Add Rate Limiter Fail-Open Handler
tasks.description: Handle Redis failures gracefully in rate limiting.
tasks.details: Implement a fail-open strategy that logs errors and allows requests if Redis is unavailable.
tasks.testStrategy: Simulate Redis failures and verify fail-open behavior.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on add rate limiter fail-open handler.

tasks.title: Develop Strategy Endpoints
tasks.description: Create REST endpoints for strategy execution, chaining, and comparison.
tasks.details: Implement FastAPI endpoints for executing, chaining, and comparing strategies. Use Pydantic for request validation and provide OpenAPI documentation.
tasks.testStrategy: Test endpoints with various requests, verifying correct execution and response formatting.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on develop strategy endpoints.

tasks.title: Create Metrics Calculation Endpoint
tasks.description: Develop a POST endpoint for calculating IR metrics.
tasks.details: Implement an endpoint that accepts retrieved and ground truth IDs, calculates metrics, and returns results in JSON format.
tasks.testStrategy: Test endpoint with sample data, verifying metric calculations and response structure.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on create metrics calculation endpoint.

tasks.title: Add Batch Metrics Endpoint
tasks.description: Develop a POST endpoint for evaluating multiple queries at once.
tasks.details: Implement functionality to process multiple queries in a single request, aggregate results, and return summary statistics.
tasks.testStrategy: Test batch processing with sample data, ensuring correct aggregation and response.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on add batch metrics endpoint.

tasks.title: Create Async Benchmark Trigger Endpoint
tasks.description: Develop a POST endpoint to start long-running benchmarks asynchronously.
tasks.details: Implement an endpoint to queue benchmark tasks and return a benchmark ID for status polling. Ensure immediate response after queuing.
tasks.testStrategy: Test task queuing and immediate response, verifying benchmark execution.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on create async benchmark trigger endpoint.

tasks.title: Develop Benchmark Status Endpoint
tasks.description: Create a GET endpoint to check benchmark progress and results.
tasks.details: Implement functionality to query benchmark status and return progress or results if complete. Support pending, running, and complete states.
tasks.testStrategy: Test status checking with various benchmark states, ensuring correct progress reporting.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on develop benchmark status endpoint.

tasks.title: Setup Embedding Cache Core
tasks.description: Implement LRU cache storage for embedding vectors.
tasks.details: Develop a thread-safe LRU cache for storing embedding vectors. Use SHA256 hashes as keys and implement eviction policies.
tasks.testStrategy: Test cache operations, including insertion, eviction, and concurrent access.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on setup embedding cache core.

tasks.title: Create Embedding Cache Key Generator
tasks.description: Generate deterministic cache keys for embeddings using SHA256.
tasks.details: Implement a function to generate cache keys by hashing text and model names. Ensure keys are unique and collision-resistant.
tasks.testStrategy: Test key generation with various inputs, verifying uniqueness and consistency.
tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down this task with a focus on create embedding cache key generator.

tasks.title: Develop Query Result TTL Cache
tasks.description: Implement a time-based cache for strategy execution results.
tasks.details: Create a TTL cache for storing execution results. Configure per-strategy TTLs and ensure automatic expiration of old entries.
tasks.testStrategy: Test TTL expiration and cache behavior with different strategies.
tasks.expansionPrompt: No expansion needed for this task.
